tournaments.S-Tier (Elite): Maximum pressure. Save-heavy meta. Lower variance for stars. Round counts 24+.
tournaments.A-Tier (International): High skill. Aggressive CT limit-testing. Ideal for 'Over' props on entry fraggers.
tournaments.Regional/Season Games: The 'Grind' Meta. Wide skill gaps. Top seeds often farm stats. High 'Over' potential.
tournaments.Qualifiers & Grassroots: Chaos meta. High variance, aim-duel focus. Poor consistency (CV).

maps.Mirage: High-exec map. Clean horizontal sightlines favor consistent HS% for riflers.
maps.Nuke: High verticality. Complex crosshair placement makes HS% more volatile.
maps.Ancient: Fast-paced, high-clutter. Mid-range duels favor spray-downs.
maps.Anubis: 2026 Active Duty. Wide lanes, aim-heavy. High HS volume.
maps.Inferno: Cramped mid-rounds. High utility usage lowers pure aim duels.
maps.Overpass: Diverse elevations. Favors AWPers for Kills; riflers struggle with HS consistency at extreme ranges.
maps.Dust 2: The 'Aim Map.' Long, flat lanes favor pure mechanical skill.
maps.Splinter: Released April 2026. High verticality and narrow lanes. Lower HS% during learning phase.

strat_archetypes.Economic Disciplinarians: High save frequency (2v4/3v5). Reduces total match duels.
strat_archetypes.Force-Buy Aggressors: Constant 2nd-round forcing. Creates high-attrition, messy rounds. Inflates Kills.
strat_archetypes.Tactical Executioners: Relies on set utility and late-round executes (<10s). Limits hero duels.

tier_2_refined_styles.Vitality: Archetype: Tactical Executioners. Systematic dominance using ropz lurking and ZywOo gravity.
tier_2_refined_styles.Falcons: Archetype: Star-Power Adaptive. High-aggression system built around NiKo and m0NESY opening picks.
tier_2_refined_styles.Spirit: Archetype: Force-Buy Aggressors. The 'Donk System.' Constant aim-duels.
tier_2_refined_styles.NAVI: Archetype: Tactical Executioners. Slowest pacing in pro CS. Extremely disciplined.

h2h_scripts.regain_vs_akimbo: High Win-Script for regain; fuzenko farms Akimbo's mid-round aggression.
h2h_scripts.phantom_vs_favbet: Survival Script. Phantom (#75) rank advantage suggests controlled map pacing.
h2h_scripts.cybershoke_vs_1win: Volatility Script. Historical 5-3 lead for CYBERSHOKE creates back-and-forth brawl.

match_pacing.Nodwin_Clutch_Series: Chaos Meta. High attrition elimination matches with inconsistent utility usage.

tournaments.S-Tier (Champions/Masters): Maximum utility discipline. Series often go to Map 3.
tournaments.A-Tier (International Leagues): The 'Meta-Forge.' Highly structured executes. High 'Over' potential.

maps.Ascent: Tactical standard. Mid-control is king. High headshot consistency.
maps.Lotus: Triple-site complexity. Fast rotations favor high-mobility duelists.
maps.Abyss: High verticality. Vertical crosshair placement is erratic; lowers pure HS%.
maps.Sanctum: Released April 2026. Corridors and water audio cues. Lower consistency during learning.

strat_archetypes.Utility Executioners: Set-heavy style. Combo-util limits hero duels. Favor 'Under' for individual stars.
strat_archetypes.Contact Aggressors: Fast-paced, aim-heavy. Teams preserve util for post-plant.
strat_archetypes.Agent-Carry Focus: Built entirely around one star (Jett/Neon/Iso) getting fed space.

tier_2_refined_styles.Sentinels: Archetype: Utility Executioners. Heavy reliance on coordinated utility.
tier_2_refined_styles.Leviatán: Archetype: Agent-Carry Focus. System built to create space for aspas.
tier_2_refined_styles.LOUD: Archetype: Mid-Round Adaptives. Known for creative agent comps.
tier_2_refined_styles.Gen.G: Archetype: Mid-Round Adaptives. High-speed coordination and elite trading.

h2h_scripts.lev_vs_g2: Carry Synergy Script. LEV win-condition relies on aspas hitting his floor (~18 kills/map).
h2h_scripts.geng_vs_ns: Tactical Domination. Gen.G's mid-round depth creates high control against NS.

match_pacing.Pacific_League: Mixed Pacing. Gen.G (Low Attrition) vs. NS (High Attrition/Aggro).
